scopes.name: $XSAPPNAME.user
scopes.description: User access to the AI agent chat

scopes.name: $XSAPPNAME.a2a
scopes.description: Invoke the orchestrator over the A2A protocol (Joule Agent Hub)

role-templates.name: AgentUser
role-templates.description: Access the AI agent chat interface

role-templates.name: AgentAdmin
role-templates.description: Create, edit, delete and reload agents via the admin UI

role-templates.name: AgentA2AClient
role-templates.description: Remote A2A client (e.g. SAP Joule) allowed to invoke the orchestrator

role-collections.name: Agent User
role-collections.description: Users who can access the AI agent chat

role-collections.name: Agent Administrator
role-collections.description: Administrators who can configure agents dynamically

role-collections.name: Agent A2A Client
role-collections.description: Technical role collection granting A2A invocation rights (assign to the Joule Agent Hub technical user or service instance)
